message:
docs(readme): add missing margins:bool to pivot_table_with_margins[_name] (br-rzdtb / fd90.114)

fd90.114: two pivot table examples missed the required margins:bool arg:

Line 1234: df.pivot_table_with_margins("revenue", "region", "product", "sum")?
  but crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:19425 declares 5 args
  (values, index_col, columns_col, aggfunc, margins: bool).

Line 1237: df.pivot_table_with_margins_name("revenue", "region",
                                            "product", "sum", "Grand Total")?
  but line 19440 declares 6 args
  (values, index_col, columns_col, aggfunc, margins: bool, margins_name: &str).

Both would fail with E0061. Without margins=true the call wouldn't
even produce a sensible margin behaviour.

Fix: add 'true' for margins on both lines (after aggfunc, before any
trailing margin_name).

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
